notes: Landlord cannot charge more than one-half of one month's rent as a security deposit.
Pet deposits are not permitted in BC.
Deposit must be returned within 15 days of the tenant vacating, with an itemized statement.

citations.statute: Residential Tenancy Act, SBC 2002, c 78, s 19(1)
citations.excerpt: A landlord must not require or accept a security deposit that is greater than one-half of one month's rent.

citations.statute: Residential Tenancy Act, SBC 2002, c 78, s 38(1)
citations.excerpt: A landlord must return the security deposit to the tenant within 15 days after the tenant vacates the rental unit.

notes: Placeholder values for calculator use. Consult RTB for current limits.
